# Kings Tree Services, LLC

Kings Tree Services, LLC is a professional tree care company based in Fort Worth, Texas. We serve residential and commercial customers across Tarrant County, Denton County, Wise County, Parker County (TX), and Southeastern Oklahoma. We are fully insured and offer free estimates.

## Services

- **Tree Removal**: Safe, complete removal of trees of all sizes with haul-off included. We handle residential and commercial properties.
- **Tree Trimming & Pruning**: Expert trimming to improve tree health, appearance, and safety across North Texas.
- **Stump Grinding & Removal**: Complete stump removal to reclaim your landscape.
- **Tree Planting**: Professional tree planting to enhance property value and curb appeal.
- **Cable Bracing**: Structural support systems to protect and preserve valuable trees.
- **Mistletoe Removal**: Protect tree health by removing parasitic mistletoe growth.
- **Emergency Tree Removal**: 24/7 emergency service for storm damage, fallen trees, and hazardous situations.

## Key Facts

- **Owner**: David King
- **Phone**: 580-927-0421
- **Email**: kingstreeservicesllc@yahoo.com
- **Available**: 24/7 for emergencies
- **Insurance**: Fully insured
- **Estimates**: Free estimates on all services
- **Rating**: 5.0 stars on Google Reviews

## Service Area

Fort Worth, TX · Tarrant County · Denton County · Wise County · Parker County · Southeastern Oklahoma

## Pricing

All services are quote-based with free estimates. Pricing depends on tree size, location, and complexity. Call or text 580-927-0421 for a free quote.

## Frequently Asked Questions

**Do you offer free estimates?**
Yes. Call or text 580-927-0421 to schedule a free, no-obligation estimate.

**Do you offer 24/7 emergency tree removal?**
Yes. Kings Tree Services responds 24/7 for emergency tree removal across Fort Worth, Tarrant County, and all areas we serve.

**What areas do you serve?**
We serve Fort Worth and surrounding North Texas areas including Tarrant, Denton, Wise, and Parker County, plus Southeastern Oklahoma.

**Are you insured?**
Yes, Kings Tree Services, LLC is fully insured for all residential and commercial tree services.

**Do you remove the debris after tree removal?**
Yes, complete haul-off is included with our tree removal services.
